title: sedum dasyphyllum subsp. granatense
intro: Sedum dasyphyllum subsp. granatense, also known as Granada stonecrop, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Crassulaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, offering various health benefits such as improving digestion, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Sedum dasyphyllum subsp. granatense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, and its extracts can be used topically to create creams and ointments for skin care.
